name: Lithic
description: Lithic — US card issuing API for virtual and physical Visa/Mastercard cards with spend controls, BINs, and real-time webhooks.

seo.title: Lithic — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Lithic: Lithic — US card issuing API for virtual and physical Visa/Mastercard cards with spend controls, BINs, and real-time webhooks.

when_to_use: Virtual and physical Visa/Mastercard card issuing via REST API
Real-time spend controls and authorization webhooks for expense management
BIN sponsorship and card program management for US fintech products
Instant virtual card creation for B2B procurement or corporate expense apps

pros: Fast self-serve onboarding for virtual cards
Real-time auth webhooks for spend control
cons: Interchange revenue share varies by scheme
review.verdict: Best modern virtual card API for US developers — pick Lithic over Marqeta for speed and simplicity.
review.best_for: US developer teams launching virtual cards with spend controls
review.not_for: Non-US programs or those needing full-stack processor features

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
